_provenance: DERIVED decision manifest, reconstructed 2026-07-17 from the committed approved snapshot (src/data/sanctionsApprovedData.ts) and candidate register. It is NOT the original completed-review input, so the snapshot sha256 is not recomputable from this file alone. Future promotions must run through promote-sanctions-snapshot.ts against the review DB and commit the completed-review JSON alongside the snapshot.
